name: financial_services_classroom_monitoring_millhaven_lib_eq
premise: Treasury operations is holding six-figure wires after a sanctions-screening model upgrade produced a spike in false positives. In Financial Services, the situation tagged internally around financial services classroom monitoring millhaven lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Marco Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Marco Vasquez, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Financial Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Omar Santos
agents.identity: I am Omar Santos, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Financial Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of equality.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of liberty even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Marco Vasquez must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Marco Vasquez do?
